some test scripts cannot import vllm, but they need to be reused.
we only install it in test environments.

vllm.title: [V1] Enable profile for LLMEngine
vllm.author: jikunshang
vllm.bodyExcerpt: #10564 enable profile for AsyncLLMEngine, this PR enable profile for LLMEngine

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix for Spec model TP + Chunked Prefill
vllm.author: andoorve
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes the issue I raised here: #9291. Chunked prefill + spec decoding + TP on the spec model fails for me with KeyError: 'num_seq_groups' when I used the following command.
vllm serve meta-llama/Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct-FP8 --tensor-parallel-size 8 --max-num-seqs 32  --block-size 32  --speculative-mo

vllm.title: [Hardware][NVIDIA] Add non-NVML CUDA mode for Jetson
vllm.author: conroy-cheers
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
NVIDIA Jetson devices do not support the NVML protocol.
This PR adds a discrete CudaJetsonPlatform platform which does not rely on NVML, and is automatically used
on Jetson devices when NVML cannot be initialized. The Jetson platform supports all CUDA functionality, but does
not support NVLink; plat

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix using `-O[0,3]` with LLM entrypoint
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When using the -O argument with the LLMEngine in benchmark_throughput.py, it would be passed a pre-parsed CompilationConfig that it would then try to dump to json, which is unneeded. I fleshed out the cases I found for parsing to also deal with integers actually being passed in.
Command and error be

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Check bnb_4bit_quant_storage for bitsandbytes
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently we only support bnb_4bit_quant_storage="uint8" but we do not check this parameter in the config. This PR adds the parameter and check if it is supported.
Uncovered by #10590

vllm.title: [V1] Refactor model executable interface for multimodal models
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR refactors the interface of all multimodal language models for V1 VLM re-arch and torch.compile support. In particular, all multimodal model implementations on vLLM will need to meet the following requirements:

get_multimodal_embeddings(**kwargs) implemented in XYZModel or XYZForConditionalG

vllm.title: [Kernel] Remove hard-dependencies of Speculative decode to CUDA workers
vllm.author: xuechendi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is mainly target to remove hard dependency for CUDA in speculative decoding
Initiated this proposal in #10131
Original PR => use current_platform to provide Dynamic WorkerCls as BaseClass for spec_decode workers
This PR provides second solution => Use WorkerWrapperBase and ModerRunnerWrapper

vllm.title: [V1] Update interface for idefics3
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Idefics3ForConditionalGeneration was left behind from #10570. This PR updates its interface to what we need in V1.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][SpecDecode] apply sampling parameters to target probabilities for consistency in rejection sampling.
vllm.author: jeongin601
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #9834 (link existing issues this PR will resolve)
Problem
The current BatchExpansionTop1Scorer implements a speculative scoring mechanism that uses batch expansion to estimate the probabilities of speculative tokens based on the scoring model. However, in the existing setup, SequenceGroupMetadat

vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth

Clean up a useless if-else in marlin_24_cuda_kernel.cu:

  
    
      vllm/csrc/quantization/marlin/sparse/marlin_24_cuda_kernel.cu
    
    
        Lines 299 to 305
      in
      0a4d968
    
  
  
    

        
          
           if (group_blocks != -1) {
